title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques the prevalence of duplicate Claude-announcement content across AI YouTube channels. He announces a new content cadence featuring weekly Wednesday videos and three live streams per week where he builds real systems like Archon and Dark Factory using Claude Code and other coding agents, focusing on engineering depth rather than announcement reactions.
